title: oxymeris aurea
intro: Oxymeris aurea, also known as the golden sea lavender, is a flowering plant native to the Mediterranean region, known for its attractive golden flowers and silvery-green foliage. The medicinal properties of Oxymeris aurea include its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antispasmodic properties, which are attributed to its essential oils and flavonoids. The health benefits of using Oxymeris aurea include reducing anxiety and stress, improving sleep quality, and alleviating symptoms of menopause, such as hot flashes and night sweats. Herbal preparations of Oxymeris aurea can be made into teas, infusions, and essential oils, which can be used to promote relaxation, soothe digestive issues, and support overall well-being.
